lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic blemishes but no major damage. The interior is clean with light signs of use. The engine and transmission are in solid working order.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear, and the interior is well-maintained with light signs of use. It is mechanically sound and has received regular service.

Experience automotive perfection with this incredible vehicle in absolute mint condition! It looks and feels brand new, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards. From its flawless paint to its pristine interior, this car is truly in showroom state and ready for a discerning new owner who appreciates a vehicle in top-tier shape.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows typical signs of age, including several minor scratches and a few small dings on the body panels, though the paint still holds a decent shine. The interior is clean but shows noticeable wear on the driver's seat and floor mats. Mechanically, the car is sound and runs well, although it may benefit from a standard tune-up soon. It offers dependable transportation for anyone looking for a well-used but functional vehicle.

This vehicle is in fair condition overall. While it remains a reliable daily driver, it does show signs of its age both mechanically and cosmetically. The engine starts and runs well, but there is a slow oil seep and the suspension is beginning to feel a bit loose over bumps. On the outside, you will find several paint chips and a minor dent on the rear bumper. The interior is functional but shows significant wear on the driver's seat and some fading on the dashboard. It is a solid car for the price, provided you are aware of these minor maintenance needs.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated engineering. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the professional seeking dependable performance without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved, so it’s totally ready for its next big adventure with you! Everything runs smoothly and it still looks great on the road. It's the perfect balance of reliability and style—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring a double-VANOS variable valve timing system and individual throttle bodies for instantaneous throttle response. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory-calibrated M Variable Differential Lock. To ensure long-term structural integrity, the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced, and the rod bearings have been serviced to maintain peak internal tolerances. The suspension geometry remains tight, providing exceptional feedback through the steering rack, while the braking system utilizes ventilated rotors for consistent thermal management. This is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s focused engineering, showing only minor aesthetic patina consistent with a well-driven enthusiast vehicle.
Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance history. Runs well. No mechanical issues.

Step into a vehicle that perfectly balances reliability with refined style. This car has been meticulously cared for, featuring a clean exterior with a deep luster and an interior that remains inviting, comfortable, and smoke-free. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a consistent maintenance schedule that ensures a dependable drive every time you turn the key. While it shows the gentle character of a well-loved vehicle, its structural integrity and mechanical performance remain robust. From the responsive handling and firm braking to the ice-cold air conditioning and intuitive dashboard controls, every detail has been preserved to provide a premium driving experience. This is a solid, honest car ready for many more miles with its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure peak operational performance. Offering a balanced combination of proven reliability and sophisticated styling, it represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver who values both quality and longevity.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained to ensure mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience and a well-preserved aesthetic. Prospective owners will appreciate the consistent care this automobile has received, making it an exceptional acquisition for those seeking quality and value in a pre-owned vehicle.

Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a prime example of a well-cared-for daily driver. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only the minor, superficial road wear expected from a car that has been driven with care. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is in excellent shape, featuring supple upholstery with minimal bolster wear and a dashboard free of any sun damage or cracks. All electronic components, including the infotainment system, dual-zone climate control, and power seats, function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule, including recent oil and filter services, a cooling system flush, and a fresh set of premium all-season tires with plenty of tread remaining. The engine idles quietly, and the transmission provides smooth, predictable shifts. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. This meticulously maintained sedan offers the perfect blend of luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a beautiful luster, showing only the lightest signs of careful road use, while the interior remains a sanctuary of comfort with supple leather upholstery and a pristine dashboard. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule, ensuring a responsive and confident driving experience. Equipped with a premium audio system, a panoramic sunroof, and a suite of advanced safety features, this car is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately. It has been a smoke-free, pet-free vehicle, and every electronic component—from the dual-zone climate control to the touchscreen navigation—functions exactly as it should. Whether you're navigating daily commutes or embarking on a cross-country road trip, this vehicle delivers performance, safety, and style in equal measure.

Used car in good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean interior. Minor exterior scuffs. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though minor road-pebble chips on the front fascia reflect its honest history as a reliable driver. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of tears, showing only light softening on the driver’s side bolster consistent with careful use. All onboard electronics, including the responsive infotainment system and dual-zone climate control, function exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and benefits from a documented service history; we recently completed a full synthetic oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure total peace of mind. The tires provide excellent grip with significant tread life remaining, and the braking system is firm and responsive. Garage-kept and smoke-free, this car offers a turnkey experience for a discerning buyer who values mechanical integrity and a polished, professional aesthetic.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, the automobile offers a refined driving experience supported by a documented history of professional care. It serves as an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver who prioritizes mechanical integrity and sophisticated aesthetics.
